product_description: Crafted from reclaimed wood, the Low Castle Stool blends warm, architectural lines with quiet utility. Its subtly stacked frame draws inspiration from fortification structures, while a discreet drawer offers practical storage for small essentials. The plush indigo-dyed cushion adds a soft contrast, inviting moments of grounded rest. Designed to sit low to the earth, this piece supports both function and presence in a space.
